tool.name: Reduction
tool.description: Runs a Mantid reduction script on a NeXus file to produce a reflectivity curve.

param.name: config_json
param.label: JSON Configuration
param.help: A JSON file with run parameters including input_file, template_file, data_directory, and output_directory. Overrides the individual parameters above when provided.

configfiles.configfile:
import json, sys with open(sys.argv[1]) as f: d = json.load(f) with open('_env.sh', 'w') as f: f.write('export EVENT_FILE="%s"
' % d.get('event_file', '')) f.write('export TEMPLATE="%s"
' % d.get('template_file', '')) f.write('export REFLECTIVITY_FILE="%s"
' % d.get('result_file', '')) f.write('export DATA_DIR="%s"
' % d.get('data_directory', sys.argv[2])) f.write('export OUTPUT_DIR="%s"
' % d.get('output_directory', sys.argv[3]))

"""Merge the input config_json with the reducer's --json summary.
argv: input_config_json reduction_summary_json output_path
The output mirrors the input config but with `result_file` replaced by `partial_file` from the reducer's summary. If no input config was given, write a minimal JSON containing only the partial/combined paths. """ import json, os, sys
input_config_path = sys.argv[1] if sys.argv[1] else None summary_path = sys.argv[2] output_path = sys.argv[3]
with open(summary_path) as f: summary = json.load(f)
partial_file = summary.get("partial_file") combined_file = summary.get("combined_file")
if input_config_path and os.path.isfile(input_config_path): with open(input_config_path) as f: merged = json.load(f) else: merged = {}
merged["result_file"] = partial_file merged["partial_file"] = partial_file merged["combined_file"] = combined_file
with open(output_path, "w") as f: json.dump(merged, f, indent=2)

tool.command: #if $config_json pixi run --as-is --manifest-path /app python '$parse_config_script' '$config_json' '$data_dir' '$output_dir' && . _env.sh && #else export EVENT_FILE='$input_file' && export TEMPLATE='$template_file' && export DATA_DIR='$data_dir' && export OUTPUT_DIR='$output_dir' && #end if mkdir -p \$OUTPUT_DIR && ln -s \$OUTPUT_DIR output && export HOME=/root && ln -s \$DATA_DIR /app/data && REDUCTION_SUMMARY="output/reduction_summary_\${RANDOM}_\$(date +%s%N).json" && pixi run --as-is --manifest-path /app simple-reduction --event-file \$EVENT_FILE --template \$TEMPLATE --output-dir output --json "\$REDUCTION_SUMMARY" > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2) && cat output/.last_reduced_set > $identifier && COMBINED_FILE=`pixi run --as-is --manifest-path /app python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(d.get('combined_file') or '')" "\$REDUCTION_SUMMARY"` && if [ -z "\$COMBINED_FILE" ] || [ ! -f "\$COMBINED_FILE" ]; then echo "reducer did not report a usable combined_file in \$REDUCTION_SUMMARY" | tee -a $output >&2; exit 1; fi && cat "\$COMBINED_FILE" > $reflectivity && pixi run --as-is --manifest-path /app python '$merge_config_script' #if $config_json '$config_json' #else '' #end if "\$REDUCTION_SUMMARY" '$updated_config'
